overview.heading: Who We Serve
overview.body: We design for consumers across Generation Z and Millennials, of all races, with wavy, curly, and coily hair — people who value quality ingredients, inclusivity, and a ritual that works for their texture.

targetConsumer.heading: Our Target Consumer
targetConsumer.text: Generation Z and Millennials of all races with wavy, curly, and coily hair. They research before they buy, value natural and beneficial ingredients, and reward brands that understand their texture. As a group, they have meaningful disposable income and are increasingly buying luxury beauty.

traits.label: Lifestyle
traits.value: A busy urban professional who enjoys a comfortable lifestyle and values quality, willing to pay a premium for superior products.

traits.label: Values
traits.value: Quality and luxury — happy to pay for premium brands that deliver.

traits.label: Motivation
traits.value: Highly motivated to care for her hair and curious about new, mostly natural ingredients that benefit it.

shoppingBehavior.description: Open to trying new brands and loyal to premium and luxury ones. Often seen in designer clothing, carrying moderate-to-luxury handbags, and using high-end cosmetics.
Influenced by online reviews, influencer endorsements, and brand authenticity.
Enjoys the ambiance of upscale stores and personalized customer service.
